reviews.review_description:
Shoot stuff, hide from stuff, blow up, laugh a bit. Hard to go wrong especially for the price. :)

Sometimes a little confused / disoriented about where I am after teleport and would love more content.

This is a great Coop experience with a friend and looks so spacey! Its just really hard!

Edit: Coop suddenly no longer works for some Quests. The screen stays black after startup.

Found this to be a really fun game with accurate shooting mechanics that remind me of something like Pistol Whip, but a more traditional arcade flavour like Virtua Cop (not visually or in terms of story though, sadly).

It's pretty difficult, so you'll spend a lot of time lying on the floor and blind firing to avoid being hit, but there are different difficulty options so it's never overly frustrating.

Loved the simplicity of the game and how it reminded me of old Sega shooter games. Would loved to have more levels, and a bit shorter, with maybe the ability to move slightly to be able to dodge bullets.
I tried the solo version didn't get to match with another player. hopefully in the coming days.
